story.heading: Built for AM/PM
story.body: Over 10 years I've managed EMEA-wide retail and POS projects for Calvin Klein, Tommy Hilfiger, Karl Lagerfeld, and Adidas — owning the client relationship, the P&L, and the delivery. Then moved into digital immersive experiences at an award-winning XR/AI studio. Same through-line: build trust with the client, scope the work honestly, and ship it on time across borders.

contact.heading: Let's talk AM/PM
contact.body: Available for Account Management and Project Management roles across EMEA — remote, hybrid, or Prague-based.
